blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,709 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 25".
